node.text: Aawwee I love kichi! He’s so amazing 🧡

@foodiswhyimbroke takes us on a food tour with some of Japan’s most amazing chefs! 👨‍🍳🎌

💡Restaurants mentioned:

1. Kichi Kichi Omurice キチ・キチ
185-4 Zaimokucho, Nakagyo Ward, Kyoto, 604-8017, Japan

2. Hekkelun コーヒー＆プリン へッケルン
Japan, 〒105-0003 Tokyo, Minato City, Nishishinbashi, 1 Chome−20−11 安藤ビル 1F

3. Izakaya Toyo 京橋居酒屋 とよ
3 Chome-2-26 Higashinodamachi, Miyakojima Ward, Osaka, 534-0024, Japan

4. Tensuke 天すけ
3 Chome-22-7 Koenjikita, Suginami City, Tokyo 166-0002, Japan

5. Sushi Taira
No address until you book. Not on google map.

6. Sushi Yoshikawa 鮨 よしかわ
Japan, 〒150-0013 Tokyo, Shibuya City, Ebisu, 1 Chome−6−3 ゼネラル恵比寿イースト1階

Have you visited any of these places before? Tell us in the comments below 😋
Aawwee I love kichi! He’s so amazing 🧡
Some of these folks have 2 hour Qs outside their joints because they became IG celebrities.
I was at the tempura Place in Tokyo, literally amazing
It would have if it werent that crazy hard to secure a reservation.
